name: ARILFaultInjectionDisturbChecksum
title: ARILFaultInjectionDisturbChecksum
syntax: long ARILFaultInjectionDisturbChecksum (dbMsg dbMessage, long type, long disturbanceMode, long disturbanceCount, long disturbanceValue);
long ARILFaultInjectionDisturbChecksum (dbMsg dbMessage, char signalGroupName[], long type, long disturbanceMode, long disturbanceCount, long disturbanceValue);
description: Disturbs the CRC of a PDU or signal group (see CRC Value). The function without the parameter for the signal group will only disturb CRCs that are not part of a signal group.

parameters.name: dbMessage
parameters.description: The symbolic name of a PDU in the database.

parameters.name: signalGroupName
parameters.description: The symbolic full name of the signal group.
Sets the CRC fix to the value of parameter disturbanceValue.
Current signal value is used (disturbanceValue is not used).
Random value is used (disturbanceValue is not used).
Signal value is increased by value of parameter disturbanceValue.
An active disturbance is stopped and the CRC will be calculated again appropriately.

parameters.name: disturbanceValue
parameters.description: According to the disturbance mode the CRC will optionally be set to this value.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
